drag-and-drop.title: Drag & Drop Components
drag-and-drop.subtitle: Interactive drag-and-drop interfaces for reordering and organizing content

draggableCards.title: Draggable Cards
draggableCards.description: Drag cards to reorder them in a grid layout

sortableList.title: Sortable List
sortableList.description: Drag cards to reorder them in a grid layout

kanbanBoard.title: Kanban Board
kanbanBoard.description: Manage your tasks across different stages

addContent.title: Add Content of Your Choice

treeView.title: Tree View
treeView.description: Drag items to reorder or move between groups

steps.step1: Click and hold on an item with the grip icon
steps.step2: Drag the item to a new position
steps.step3: Release to drop the item in its new location
steps.step4: For Kanban boards, drag tasks between columns to change status
